allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Create BRIDES purchase decision assistant

- React + Vite + Tailwind CSS setup for static site deployment
- Stripe-inspired UI with mesh gradient backgrounds and glassmorphism
- Drag & drop file upload for Excel/CSV spreadsheets
- Automatic column detection and data parsing with xlsx library
- Purchase decision engine based on projected vs target coverage
- Dashboard with summary cards, urgency distribution, and data table
- Table features: search, filters, sorting, pagination
- CSV export functionality
- Framer Motion animations throughout
- Fully responsive design

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
